<router-outlet></router-outlet>

<button *ngIf="authService.isAuthenticatedUser()" (click)="logout()">
  Logout
</button>
import { Component } from '@angular/core';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-root',
  templateUrl: './app.component.html',
  styleUrls: ['./app.component.css'],
})
export class AppComponent {
  title = 'TMS';
}
